title: ULLMANN REACTION / COUPLING / BIARYL SYNTHESIS
summary: Overview page for Ullmann biaryl synthesis describing copper-mediated homocoupling and cross-coupling of aryl halides to symmetrical or unsymmetrical biaryls.
notes: Emphasizes classical high-temperature copper-mediated biaryl bond formation and mechanistic proposals involving aryl radicals or arylcopper intermediates.

title: ULLMANN REACTION / COUPLING / BIARYL SYNTHESIS
summary: Application page for Ullmann biaryl synthesis highlighting Ziegler-modified and mild Cu-mediated biaryl couplings in the syntheses of tortuosine, mastigophorenes, taspine, and heterobiaryls.
notes: Examples showcase atroposelective oxazoline-assisted coupling, classical Cu-bronze coupling, and room-temperature CuTC-mediated heteroaryl couplings.

title: VILSMEIER-HAACK FORMYLATION
summary: Overview page for the Vilsmeier-Haack formylation describing electrophilic formylation with a chloroiminium reagent generated from DMF and phosphoryl chloride or related acid chlorides.
notes: Covers reagent formation, aromatic and heteroaromatic formylation, and enol-ether or diene applications leading to aldehydes and α,β-unsaturated carbonyl compounds.

title: VILSMEIER-HAACK FORMYLATION
summary: Application page for the Vilsmeier-Haack formylation featuring regioselective formylation in the syntheses of calanolide A, FR-900482, illudin C, homofascaplysin C, and arthrographol.
notes: Examples emphasize late-stage introduction or manipulation of aldehydes on coumarins, indoles, enol ethers, and fused azaaromatics.

title: VINYLCYCLOPROPANE-CYCLOPENTENE REARRANGEMENT
summary: Overview page for the vinylcyclopropane-cyclopentene rearrangement describing thermal, photochemical, or Lewis-acid-mediated conversion of vinylcyclopropanes into cyclopentenes.
notes: Highlights mechanistic pictures involving diradical or dipolar pathways and notes the importance of flash vacuum pyrolysis and competing retro-ene processes.

title: VINYLCYCLOPROPANE-CYCLOPENTENE REARRANGEMENT
summary: Application page for the vinylcyclopropane-cyclopentene rearrangement highlighting photoinduced, Lewis-acid-mediated, thermal, and low-temperature variants in the syntheses of capnellene, antheridic acid, retigeranic acid, and specionin.
notes: Examples show rearrangement-enabled construction of cyclopentane-annulated and tricyclic frameworks in terpene synthesis.

title: VON PECHMANN REACTION
summary: Overview page for the von Pechmann reaction describing acid-catalyzed condensation of phenols with β-keto esters or related carbonyl partners to form coumarins.
notes: Summarizes the classical Pechmann condensation and its substrate, catalyst, and mechanistic trends for coumarin synthesis.

title: VON PECHMANN REACTION
summary: Application page for the von Pechmann reaction highlighting coumarin assembly in the syntheses of pyridoangelicins, 4-substituted coumarins, benzopsoralen derivatives, and retinoid X receptor modulators.
notes: Examples emphasize both strongly acidic and mild InCl3-catalyzed variants for medicinally relevant coumarin and fused psoralen scaffolds.

title: WACKER OXIDATION
summary: Overview page for the Wacker oxidation describing Pd/Cu-catalyzed oxidation of terminal alkenes to methyl ketones and related Wacker-type oxidative cyclizations or allylic ether oxidations.
notes: Includes the industrial Wacker-Smidt process, Wacker-type nucleophile-assisted cyclizations, and β-alkoxyketone formation from allylic ethers.

title: WACKER OXIDATION
summary: Application page for the Wacker oxidation highlighting terminal alkene oxidation and intramolecular Wacker-type cyclizations in the syntheses of sclerophytin A, hennoxazole A, himandrine skeleton, and garsubellin A core.
notes: Examples show both classical PdCl2/CuCl/O2 conditions and modified Cu(OAc)2- or peroxide-assisted oxidative cyclizations.
